response.overview: Pamela Anderson, star of TVs Baywatch, went from small-town girl to city-chic by way of the dream express. Now a Playmate, PLAYBOY cover girl and popular model and actress, Pamela reached for the stars and caught 'em. Says pretty Pamela, "I hope I always keep my feet planted firmly in the clouds!" So will you, as she puts her vivid imagination into play and takes you on a sky-high adventure. This beautiful dreamer is sure to keep you dreaming night after night!
response.title: Playboy: Pamela Anderson
